# Stakeholder Communications Plan Template

**Owner:** Stakeholder Liaison  
**Related roles:** [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)

## Purpose
Define and track how the project team communicates with stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle to ensure alignment, manage expectations, and surface issues early.

---

## Stakeholder Map

| Stakeholder / Group | Role / Interest | Influence | Communication Need |
|---|---|---|---|
| | | High / Med / Low | |

---

## Communication Cadence

| Audience | Channel | Frequency | Owner | Format |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Executive Sponsor | Email / Deck | Monthly | Stakeholder Liaison | Status summary |
| Business Stakeholders | Meeting / Slack | Bi-weekly | Stakeholder Liaison | Progress update |
| Project Team | Standup / Chat | Daily | Project Manager | Operational sync |
| External Partners | Email | As needed | Stakeholder Liaison | Formal update |

---

## Channels

- **Async:** Email, shared project board, wiki/docs
- **Sync:** Recurring meetings, ad-hoc calls
- **Emergency:** Direct message or phone for urgent escalations

---

## Status Update Template

Use this format for regular stakeholder updates:

```
Project: [Name]
Date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
Status: On Track / At Risk / Blocked

Progress since last update:
-

Upcoming milestones:
-

Risks & issues:
-

Decisions needed:
-
```

---

## Escalation Path

1. Issue raised within project team
2. Stakeholder Liaison assesses impact and urgency
3. Escalate to Project Manager if unresolved within 24 hours
4. Project Manager escalates to Product Lead or Sponsor as needed
5. Resolution and outcome communicated back to stakeholders

See also: [Risk Management & Communication](../octoacme-risks-and-communication.md)

---

## Checklist — Communications Plan Setup

- [ ] Stakeholder map completed and reviewed with PM
- [ ] Communication cadence agreed and calendar invites sent
- [ ] Channels confirmed and access granted
- [ ] Escalation path documented and shared
- [ ] Status update template adopted by team
